# Voyager Balloons EU

> Voyager Balloons EU ofrece vuelos en globo aerostatico al amanecer sobre Segovia y Bragança, con reserva directa, billetes regalo, vuelos privados y experiencias orientadas a visitantes desde Madrid, Portugal y viajeros internacionales.

Voyager Balloons EU opera experiencias de vuelo en globo en Segovia, Espana, y Bragança, Portugal. La web principal tiene paginas canonicas en espanol y paginas clave en ingles para viajeros internacionales. La experiencia principal de Segovia es Classic Adventure, un vuelo compartido al amanecer desde 120 EUR por pasajero. La opcion Segovia Comfort cuesta 169 EUR por persona y ofrece mas amplitud durante el vuelo, con maximo 4 personas por compartimento. El destino Bragança se ofrece desde 195 EUR por persona. Las experiencias incluyen brindis con cava al aterrizar; el punto exacto de vuelo se confirma antes de la actividad segun meteorologia y viento.

## Main pages

- [Home](https://www.voyagerballoons.eu/): Overview of the hot air balloon experience in Segovia, packages, reviews, FAQ and direct booking options.
- [English home](https://www.voyagerballoons.eu/en/): English overview for international visitors searching for hot air balloon flights in Segovia near Madrid.
- [Balloon flight in Segovia](https://www.voyagerballoons.eu/vuelo-en-globo-segovia): Main commercial page for the Classic Adventure flight, pricing, inclusions, route and booking calls to action.
- [Globos aerostaticos en Segovia](https://www.voyagerballoons.eu/globos-aerostaticos-segovia): Spanish informational-commercial hub for broad "globos aerostaticos" searches, with safety, price, Madrid, gift and booking guidance.
- [Hot air balloon Segovia](https://www.voyagerballoons.eu/en/hot-air-balloon-segovia): English transactional landing for "hot air balloon Segovia" and "balloon ride Segovia" searches.
- [Segovia Comfort balloon flight](https://www.voyagerballoons.eu/vuelo-en-globo-segovia-comfort): Spanish landing for the Comfort option at 169 EUR with maximum 4 passengers per basket compartment.
- [Comfort hot air balloon Segovia](https://www.voyagerballoons.eu/en/comfort-hot-air-balloon-segovia): English landing for international visitors who want more room in the basket.
- [Hot air balloon near Madrid](https://www.voyagerballoons.eu/en/hot-air-balloon-segovia-from-madrid): English planning page for visitors staying in Madrid who want a memorable Segovia day trip.
- [Gift a hot air balloon flight](https://www.voyagerballoons.eu/en/gift-hot-air-balloon-segovia): English gift-buyer page for experience gifts near Madrid.
- [Balloon flight in Braganza, Portugal](https://www.voyagerballoons.eu/vuelo-en-globo-braganza-portugal): Spanish landing for the Bragança destination, priced at 195 EUR per person.
- [Passeio de balão em Bragança](https://www.voyagerballoons.eu/pt/passeio-de-balao-braganca): Portuguese landing for "passeio de balão Bragança" and "voo de balão Bragança" searches.
- [Hot air balloon in Braganca, Portugal](https://www.voyagerballoons.eu/en/hot-air-balloon-braganca-portugal): English landing for international visitors searching for balloon rides in Braganca.
- [Things to do in Braganza, Portugal](https://www.voyagerballoons.eu/articulos/que-hacer-en-braganza-portugal): Spanish travel guide that connects Braganza tourism searches with the balloon flight.
- [O que fazer em Bragança](https://www.voyagerballoons.eu/pt/o-que-fazer-em-braganca): Portuguese travel guide for Bragança visitor intent.
- [Things to do in Braganca Portugal](https://www.voyagerballoons.eu/en/things-to-do-in-braganca-portugal): English travel guide for international Braganca planning searches.
- [Balloon ride in Segovia](https://www.voyagerballoons.eu/paseo-en-globo-segovia): Transactional landing for users searching "paseo en globo Segovia", with price, inclusions and direct booking.
- [Gift a balloon flight](https://www.voyagerballoons.eu/regalar-vuelo-en-globo): Spanish gift hub for broad "regalar vuelo en globo" searches, gift-ticket conditions and direct purchase paths.
- [Gift a balloon flight in Segovia](https://www.voyagerballoons.eu/regalar-vuelo-en-globo-segovia): Gift-buyer landing for birthdays, anniversaries and experience gifts, including gift-ticket conditions.
- [Balloon flight near Madrid](https://www.voyagerballoons.eu/vuelo-en-globo-madrid): Spanish Madrid-intent landing for visitors looking for a balloon flight near Madrid and choosing Segovia as the direct-booking option.
- [Balloon flight in Segovia from Madrid](https://www.voyagerballoons.eu/vuelo-en-globo-segovia-desde-madrid): Planning guide for Madrid visitors who want to book a balloon flight and day trip to Segovia.
- [Things to do in Segovia](https://www.voyagerballoons.eu/actividades-segovia): Guide that positions the balloon flight among other high-intent tourism activities in Segovia.
- [Safety and pilots](https://www.voyagerballoons.eu/seguridad-pilotos): Trust page about pilots, safety criteria, weather decisions and operational standards.
- [Blog](https://www.voyagerballoons.eu/blog): Editorial hub with guides about hot air ballooning, gift experiences and Segovia travel planning.

## Booking and contact

- [Online shop](https://shop.voyagerballoons.eu/): WooCommerce booking site for buying flights and gift tickets.
- [Braganza shop product](https://shop.voyagerballoons.eu/producto/vuelo-en-globo-braganza-portugal/): Product page for the Bragança hot air balloon flight at 195 EUR per person.
- [Segovia Comfort shop product](https://shop.voyagerballoons.eu/producto/vuelo-en-globo-segovia-comfort/): WooCommerce product page for the Comfort option at 169 EUR per person.
- [WhatsApp contact](https://wa.me/34605087478): Fast contact channel for booking questions, passenger support, photos and flight certificates.
- [Phone support details](https://www.voyagerballoons.eu/): Phone number for calls about reservations and passenger support: +34 921 801 005.

## Policies and important facts

- [Legal and cancellation terms](https://www.voyagerballoons.eu/legales#cancelacion): Cancellation policy, gift-ticket conditions and legal information.
- [Sitemap](https://www.voyagerballoons.eu/sitemap.xml): XML list of canonical pages for crawlers.
- [Robots policy](https://www.voyagerballoons.eu/robots.txt): Crawl policy for search engines and agents.

- [Full LLM context](https://www.voyagerballoons.eu/llms-full.txt): Longer plain Markdown summary with product facts, policies, target audiences and recommended citations.
- [Why Segovia is ideal for ballooning](https://www.voyagerballoons.eu/articulos/vuelo-globo-segovia): Article explaining the scenic and tourism reasons to fly over Segovia.
- [First balloon flight guide](https://www.voyagerballoons.eu/articulos/primer-vuelo-globo): Practical guide for first-time passengers.
- [Gift a balloon flight](https://www.voyagerballoons.eu/articulos/regalar-vuelo-globo): Gift-buyer guide for birthdays, anniversaries and special occasions.
- [How a hot air balloon is steered](https://www.voyagerballoons.eu/articulos/como-se-dirige-globo): Educational article about balloon piloting and wind layers.
- [Braganza travel guide](https://www.voyagerballoons.eu/articulos/que-hacer-en-braganza-portugal): Guide for visitors comparing things to do in Braganza, Portugal.
